abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Massive Jaws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a lower Sz than this model, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Onslaught
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Smell Weakness
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Adversary token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Grasping Tentacles
actions.effects: Move the target 5" in a straight line. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 15 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

actions.name: Raging Bellow
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must discard a card or be moved up to 3" away from this model. If this action receives a raise, all moved models gain an Adversary token.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.
